# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for S3 bucket to store user-uploaded files and application backups.

Resources:
  UserUploadsAndBackupsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: user-uploads-and-backups
      AccessControl: Private
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Suspended
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: "LifecycleRule"
            Status: Disabled
            ExpirationInDays: 30

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref UserUploadsAndBackupsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: arn:aws:iam::YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID:role/YOUR_APPLICATION_ROLE
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "${UserUploadsAndBackupsBucket.Arn}/*"
